title: SpaceX IPO: The .5 Trillion Bet (Two-Host Conversation)
description: Steven and guest debate SpaceX's .5T IPO — Starlink's AdWords model, 9.2M customers, 5M internal vs 4M launch cost, Starship V3, xAI merger bull/bear, 7 Powers framework, and the 50-flight benchmark for investing.

title: SpaceX IPO: The .5 Trillion Bet
